overview: Sathyabama Institute of Science and Technology, located in Jeppiaar Nagar, Chennai, Tamil Nadu, is a premier private deemed-to-be university established in 1987 as Sathyabama Engineering College. Founded by Dr. Jeppiaar, the institution is widely recognized for excellence in engineering, biotechnology, marine biology, space science, and interdisciplinary research, maintaining a strong reputation across South India's technical education ecosystem.
accreditation: NAAC A++ Accredited; Category-1 Deemed-to-be University status granted by UGC; Several engineering programs accredited by ABET.

coursesAndFees.program: B.E. / B.Tech Computer Science (CSE) & Elite IT Programs

placements.companiesVisited: Amazon, Accenture, Cognizant, Deloitte, Capgemini, HCL Technologies, Ernst & Young, PwC, Renault Nissan, TCS
placements.internationalOffers: Global technology enterprises offered packages up to ₹53 LPA.

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are primarily conducted through the Sathyabama All India Entrance Examination (SAEEE), JEE Main scores, and merit-based eligibility depending on the program.
admissions.importantDates: Admission timelines generally follow SAEEE examination schedules and the annual academic admission calendar released by the university.

campus.area: Large urban residential campus in Jeppiaar Nagar, Chennai
campus.specialNote: Hostel charges range between ₹40,000 – ₹50,000 per semester with integrated mess facilities serving North Indian and South Indian meals. Total residential expenditure generally ranges between ₹45,000 – ₹55,000 per semester.

contact.address: Sathyabama Institute of Science and Technology, Jeppiaar Nagar, Rajiv Gandhi Salai, Chennai – 600119, Tamil Nadu, India

details: Dr. Jeppiaar Remission Subsidies with full tuition and mess fee waivers for SAEEE top rankers
Merit-based tuition fee concessions ranging from 10% to 50%
Government scholarship support for SC, ST, and minority students through central and state portals
